creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yonas Yanfa from comment #4)
It doesn't.

2023/08/17 08:48:13 main.go:108: Using config: /home/fernape/.config/gorss/gorss.conf
2023/08/17 08:48:13 main.go:109: Using theme: /home/fernape/.config/gorss/themes/default.theme
2023/08/17 08:48:13 main.go:110: Using DB: /home/fernape/.local/share/gorss/gorss.db
2023/08/17 08:48:13 main.go:111: Using log file: /home/fernape/.local/share/gorss/gorss.log

That's it. Nothing shows up. If you are using the 0.3 version in the repository, it doesn't work either except by mere luck. It needs infocmp which comes with ncurses but it is not listed as a run dependency.
